results.question: Describe the natural circulation mechanism in the NuScale RCS and the role of the riser in establishing flow.
results.expected_answer: The NuScale RCS uses natural circulation without reactor coolant pumps. Heated coolant rises through the hot leg riser due to density differences between hot and cold fluid.
